  • Module

  • Help

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Board
Represents the root node of the Sudoku board tree structure.
BoardGenerator
Generates a valid, randomized Sudoku solution for a Board using an iterative backtracking algorithm driven by a SudokuStack.
BoardManager
Coordinates the active game state: board tree, generation, hints, and undo history.
Cell
Represents a single cell in the Sudoku board.
CellInputAdapter
Adapter for ICellInputListener providing empty default implementations.
CellInputHandler
Concrete input handler.
CellInputHandler.CellInputCallback
Callback implemented by the controller.
GameController
Controller for game-view.fxml.
GameView
Responsible for all JavaFX node creation, styling, and updates for the board grid and digit toolbar.
GameView.CellState
Visual states a cell can be rendered in.
GameView.TriConsumer<A,B,C>
Functional interface for three-argument event lambdas.
HintProvider
Provides hint suggestions to the player by finding an empty cell that can be filled with a valid number according to Sudoku rules.
ICellInputListener
Contract for handling player input directed at the Sudoku board.
Launcher
 
Main
 
Region
Represents a 2×3 region (block) in the Sudoku board.
SceneManager
Singleton that owns the primary Stage and handles scene transitions.
SudokuStack<T>
A generic stack data structure implemented from scratch without external libraries.
